---
title: \{SET\}group junction
author: Kyle P Messier
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
documentclass: book
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    df_print: kable
    toc_depth: 2
    always_allow_html: yes
    theme: journal
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---

## 

## [{SET}group logo](SETlogo.html)


## [Reproducible Research Guide](Reproducible_Research.html)

## [R Style Guide](R-Style-guide.html)


## [Scientific-Computing](Scientific_Computing.html)


## [Project Management](Project_Management.html)

##  [Communication](Communication.html)
